name: Fabled Gammajin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>轟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ガミュジン
desc:
1 "Fabled" Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Your opponent cannot target other "Fabled" Synchro Monsters you control with card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Fabled Gammajin" once per turn. If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Fabled" monster from your hand or Deck. If this card is sent to the GY: You can draw cards equal to the number of "Fabled" Synchro Monsters you control, then discard 1 card.
mnst_eff:

If this card is sent to the GY: You can draw cards equal to the number of "Fabled" Synchro Monsters you control, then discard 1 card.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Requires archetype specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Does not require specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
